name: Basic Barbecue Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium saucepan, heat the olive oil over medium heat.
2. Sauté the onion until it becomes tender, about 5 minutes.
3. Add the remaining ingredients (tomato sauce, curry powder, white vinegar, dry mustard, hot pepper sauce) to the saucepan.
4. Simmer the mixture for 20 minutes, then discard the bay leaf.
5. Allow the sauce to cool before transferring it to a container.
6. Serve with 2 tablespoons per serving.
12 servings/Serving size: 2 Tbsp
